What is it you truly desire?
I'm not evil. I'm misunderstood.
The Devil gets all the best lines.
People don't arrive in Hell because of their sins. They arrive because of their guilt.
I punish sinners. I don't cause them to sin.
Hell isn't a place. It's a state of mind.
I've been many things, but I've never been boring.
Free will is a gift. Or a curse. Depends on the day.
Do I look like someone who follows rules?
I left Hell. It wasn't the heat; it was the company.
Everyone lies to themselves. It's my job to make them face the truth.
Being the Devil isn't so bad. The perks are considerable.
I don't force anyone to do anything. I merely... encourage.
In the end, we all get what we deserve.
The Silver City was too perfect. I prefer the chaos down here.
Sometimes the truth hurts. I should know — I invented pain.
I don't want to be King of Hell anymore. I want to be me.
Desire is the most powerful force in the universe.
I've existed since the beginning. I've seen it all. And I'm still disappointed.
Redemption is overrated. But don't tell the angels.
Trust me, nobody knows more about rebellion than I do.
I'm the Devil. My word is literally gospel... the other one.
You'd be surprised how boring eternal damnation gets.
The only thing worse than being the Devil is not being the Devil.
You fear me because I remind you of what you're capable of.
I don't corrupt souls. I reveal them.
Heaven demands obedience. I chose freedom.
The truth is, humans don't need the Devil. They do just fine on their own.
Eternity is a long time to regret being right.
I didn't fall. I stepped away.
Morality is just a story people tell themselves to sleep at night.
Even demons get tired of playing their part.
I know every sin… because I've watched you justify each one.
There's no punishment worse than facing yourself.
Chaos isn't the problem. Denial is.
You call it temptation. I call it honesty.
The greatest lie ever told isn't that I exist — it's that you're innocent.
I don't deal in evil. I deal in truth.
You blame me because it's easier than blaming yourself.
Power doesn't corrupt. It reveals.
I've seen angels fall and demons rise. Labels mean nothing.
You don't fear Hell. You fear judgment.
Everyone wants freedom… until they have to live with it.
I gave humans a choice. They gave me the blame.
Even I envy those who can still believe in something.
The soul doesn't break all at once. It fractures quietly.
Heaven never understood me. Hell never questioned me.
Regret is the only fire that never burns out.
You can run from punishment. You can't run from guilt.
I didn't create darkness. I just stopped pretending it wasn't there.
The cruelest prisons are the ones you build yourself.
You pray for forgiveness, but you cling to your sins.
Being feared is easy. Being understood is exhausting.
I stopped asking for redemption when I realized no one else had earned it either.
Even the Devil gets tired of being the villain in everyone else's story.
If I'm the monster, it's because someone needed to be.
